meta.title: ai-router — AI-Powered Semantic Search Router
meta.description: Navigate your app by meaning, not keywords

nav.searchPlaceholder: Ask anything… e.g. "how to set up routing?"

home.subtitle: Navigate your app by meaning, not keywords. Powered by HuggingFace embeddings and Orama vector search — runs entirely in the browser.
home.feature1Desc: Uses AI embeddings to understand user intent. Typos, synonyms, and natural language all work out of the box.
home.feature2Desc: The ML model runs inside a Web Worker in the browser. No API calls, no server costs, fully offline-capable. Supports progressive model loading — start fast, upgrade in the background.
home.feature3Desc: First-class plugins for Vite, webpack, and Next.js. Auto-scan your pages directory — zero config.
home.feature4Desc: Gracefully handles server-side rendering. The router is inert on the server and activates only in the browser.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.intro: Get ai-router up and running in your project in under 5 minutes.
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Install the core package and optionally a bundler plugin:
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Create your route configuration with semantic descriptions:
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Wait for the model to load, then search by meaning:
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Destroy the router when you're done. If you use SmartRouter.create(), the instance is cached — no need to destroy on every unmount:
gettingStarted.note: The first load downloads a ~22 MB ONNX model. It's cached by the browser for subsequent visits. Use SmartRouter.preload() at page load to pre-warm the model in the background.

apiReference.title: API Reference
apiReference.smartRouterDesc: The main class for semantic route matching.
apiReference.constructorDesc: Creates a new SmartRouter instance with the given options.
apiReference.routesDesc: Array of routes to index. Each route has path, title, and optional description.
apiReference.modelDesc: HuggingFace model ID or an ordered array of IDs for progressive loading. Default: "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2". Must produce 384-dim vectors.
apiReference.onModelUpgradeDesc: Callback called each time the router upgrades to the next model in the chain. Only relevant when model is an array.
apiReference.createDesc: Returns a cached instance for the given model config. Safe to call on every component mount — reuses the existing worker and model.
apiReference.preloadDesc: Pre-downloads the model(s) and indexes routes in the background. Call at page load so the router is ready when the user needs it.
apiReference.readyDesc: Resolves when the first model is loaded and routes are indexed. Resolves immediately during SSR.
apiReference.searchDesc: Finds the best matching route for a natural-language query. Returns null if no route meets the threshold or during SSR.
apiReference.destroyDesc: Terminates the Web Worker, rejects all pending searches, and removes from cache. Safe to call multiple times.
apiReference.searchResultDesc: Returned by search(). Contains path (matched route URL) and score (similarity 0–1).
